winning_test.source:
import gradebook.analytics as analytics


def test_clamp_percent_preserves_fractional_value_above_zero():
    value = 0.5
    assert analytics.clamp_percent(value) == value
winning_test.targeted_behavior: Values strictly between 0 and 1 are already within the original inclusive range and must be returned unchanged.
